TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Kuke_a_tademaw, title = Kuke_a_tademaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kuke_a_tademaw} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Kuke"kuke a kamu: ŕ©ŔąōĪōĮ‚Äéluma a :Kurd" umaudipay i siyaa pahutinau a binacadan, i tipan tu timulan yakutesetan a kitidaan nuytiniay a tademaw. Śĺ∑śóŹ . nilaculan pulung nu tademaw tulul malebut aemang, sayadahay nikalakalak i tualci, siliya,yilake, yilang sepat a liwliw nu kanatal , idaw adidi' i yasaypayzan atu yamayniya e u nu timulan, yiseliy a kitidaan. I cungtung malusasa nu alapu tualci, atu puse ku tademaw,sakasepat a binacadan, malu maminay nu kitakid inayay ku kanatal nu binacadan sayadahay ku tademaw. ÁłĹšļļŚŹ£3000Ťź¨, . Kute a binacadan u icungtungay a tademaw aydaay sa tenesay a binacadan , tusamalebut tu kumihcaan katukuh ayda sa itini tu i kutesetan a buyu'buyu'an ku kitidaan a musaungay, u pahutin ku kawaw nu heni atu hida uhitay ku nikaudip, nudukudasa saahebal sa pakaynien i liwliw nu kakitidaan a mubuwah,capi nu ayda a mihcaan maydih patideng tu nu heni a kanatal , nika sawsawni puluan bu tulci, siliya, yilake a kanatal apenecan, alahican idaw ku kavalilaw tu masasu ada atademaw , duma mikuliay nu sihang a kanatal palu sakatalawan a tademaw han.. . Itini i hahuyceasate a nikuwanan nu siliya, kute a binacada a dikuc , ulisin atu kute ani patahekal tu cudad mausaw haminen apuluan; kyu u tulci kinapana maydih palekal masasuada tu tanuidang sa tu, 1991 "akute" nuayawan a mihcaan, akamu u sakaedengan nu tualci, kute hida hantu "buyu'ay atademaw kani pangangan. Nikuwanan nu satamu nu yilakepasayda i kute a binacadan mangaleb ku pisawacu, nakakyni palekal tu nu "alapu sa" ahulic, i yilaku katuud ku kute abinacadan haminen amubahbah patayda i yilang, anu caay sa kasenunhan mupatay. u mikingliway nu kute a binacadan udip itawya kuwanan nu yilang italakaway a enal miti a tademaw ku kakawsan sa, Pulung nu mihcaan enem ay asiki, miti makuwan nu puseti lusetati, miti atademaw atu puse a tademaw malalamel mala aydaay nu kute a binacadan . Kute a binacada nikaudip kitidaan nu heni i pulung nu mihcaan sepat a siki nudikudan tu katukuh oitu asiki nadikuda makuwan nu sayliwkuwang,ansitiku,limatiku,sasanpuse,tunglumatuku.yumahida kute a binacadan caay pakatidenh ku heni tu nu udip tu a sapikuwan,nika mademec tu nu icelangay a duma a binacaday, kyu hidasatu ku ngangan nu heni. pulung nu siki i mautang tu, baluhay a alapu atademaw lekeb han nuheni ku siya, kitidaan nu kuteabinacadan kinacacay aca a pasatedep, nipasatedep amasasuada kilusa tu u pipenec nu yiselan, kyukute abunacadan mademec nu alapu kyu milahay tu yiselan. alapu a kanatal nu dikuda malengat, telaymu a tademaw patideng sat u payi, tawya sa 945 amihcaan katukuh 1055 amihcaan kuwanan nu yilang nu tipan atu yilake mamin.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == kuk…ô"kuk…ô a kamu: *****r~…ĺuma a :kurd" umaudipaj i sijaa pańßutinau a bina ¶adan, i tipan tu timur~…ĺan jakut…ôs…ôtan a kitidaan nujtiniaj a tad…ômaw. ** . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan pur~…ĺuŇč nu tad…ômaw tur~…ĺur~…ĺ mar~…ĺ…ôbut a…ômaŇč, sajadańßaj nikar~…ĺakar~…ĺak i tuar~…ĺ ¶i, sir~…ĺija,jir~…ĺak…ô, jir~…ĺaŇč s…ôpat a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu kanatar~…ĺ , idaw adidi Ē~ ° i jasajpajzan atu jamajnija …ô u nu timur~…ĺan, jis…ôr~…ĺij a kitidaan. i ¶uŇčtuŇč mar~…ĺusasa nu ar~…ĺapu tuar~…ĺ ¶i, atu pus…ô ku tad…ômaw,sakas…ôpat a bina ¶adan, mar~…ĺu maminaj nu kitakid inajaj ku kanatar~…ĺ nu bina ¶adan sajadańßaj ku tad…ômaw. ********, . kut…ô a bina ¶adan u i ¶uŇčtuŇčaj a tad…ômaw ajdaaj sa t…ôn…ôsaj a bina ¶adan , tusamar~…ĺ…ôbut tu kumińß ¶aan katukuńß ajda sa itini tu i kut…ôs…ôtan a buju Ē~ °buju Ē~ °an ku kitidaan a musauŇčaj, u pańßutin ku kawaw nu ńß…ôni atu ńßida uńßitaj ku nikaudip, nudukudasa saańß…ôbar~…ĺ sa pakajni…ôn i r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu kakitidaan a mubuwańß, ¶api nu ajda a mińß ¶aan majdińß patid…ôŇč tu nu ńß…ôni a kanatar~…ĺ , nika sawsawni pur~…ĺuan bu tur~…ĺ ¶i, sir~…ĺija, jir~…ĺak…ô a kanatar~…ĺ ap…ôn…ô ¶an, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an idaw ku ka*ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw tu masasu ada atad…ômaw , duma mikur~…ĺiaj nu sińßaŇč a kanatar~…ĺ par~…ĺu sakatar~…ĺawan a tad…ômaw ńßan.. . itini i ńßańßuj ¶…ôasat…ô a nikuwanan nu sir~…ĺija, kut…ô a bina ¶ada a diku ¶ , ur~…ĺisin atu kut…ô ani patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ¶udad mausaw ńßamin…ôn apur~…ĺuan; kju u tur~…ĺ ¶i kinapana majdińß par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ masasuada tu tanuidaŇč sa tu, **** "akut…ô" nuajawan a mińß ¶aan, akamu u saka…ôd…ôŇčan nu tuar~…ĺ ¶i, kut…ô ńßida ńßantu "buju Ē~ °aj atad…ômaw kani paŇčaŇčan. nikuwanan nu satamu nu jir~…ĺak…ôpasajda i kut…ô a bina ¶adan maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ku pisawa ¶u, nakakjni par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu nu "ar~…ĺapu sa" ańßur~…ĺi ¶, i jir~…ĺaku katuud ku kut…ô abina ¶adan ńßamin…ôn amubańßbańß patajda i jir~…ĺaŇč, anu ¶aaj sa kas…ônunńßan mupataj. u mikiŇčr~…ĺiwaj nu kut…ô a bina ¶adan udip itawja kuwanan nu jir~…ĺaŇč itar~…ĺakawaj a …ônar~…ĺ miti a tad…ômaw ku kakawsan sa, pur~…ĺuŇč nu mińß ¶aan …ôn…ôm aj asiki, miti makuwan nu pus…ôti r~…ĺus…ôtati, miti atad…ômaw atu pus…ô a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ mar~…ĺa ajdaaj nu kut…ô a bina ¶adan . kut…ô a bina ¶ada nikaudip kitidaan nu ńß…ôni i pur~…ĺuŇč nu mińß ¶aan s…ôpat a siki nudikudan tu katukuńß oitu asiki nadikuda makuwan nu sajr~…ĺiwkuwaŇč,ansitiku,r~…ĺimatiku,sasanpus…ô,tuŇčr~…ĺumatuku.jumańßida kut…ô a bina ¶adan ¶aaj pakatid…ônńß ku ńß…ôni tu nu udip tu a sapikuwan,nika mad…ôm…ô ¶ tu nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a duma a bina ¶adaj, kju ńßidasatu ku ŇčaŇčan nu ńß…ôni. pur~…ĺuŇč nu siki i mautaŇč tu, bar~…ĺuńßaj a ar~…ĺapu atad…ômaw r~…ĺ…ôk…ôb ńßan nuńß…ôni ku sija, kitidaan nu kut…ôabina ¶adan kina ¶a ¶aj a ¶a a pasat…ôd…ôp, nipasat…ôd…ôp amasasuada kir~…ĺusa tu u pip…ôn…ô ¶ nu jis…ôr~…ĺan, kjukut…ô abuna ¶adan mad…ôm…ô ¶ nu ar~…ĺapu kju mir~…ĺańßaj tu jis…ôr~…ĺan. ar~…ĺapu a kanatar~…ĺ nu dikuda mar~…ĺ…ôŇčat, t…ôr~…ĺajmu a tad…ômaw patid…ôŇč sat u paji, tawja sa *** amińß ¶aan katukuńß **** amińß ¶aan kuwanan nu jir~…ĺaŇč nu tipan atu jir~…ĺak…ô mamin.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Kuke"kuke a kamu: ŕ©ŔąōĪōĮ‚Äéluma a :Kurd" umaudipay i siyaa pahutinau a binacadan, i tipan tu timulan yakutesetan a kitidaan nuytiniay a tademaw. Śĺ∑śóŹ . nilaculan pulung nu tademaw tulul malebut aemang, sayadahay nikalakalak i tualci, siliya,yilake, yilang sepat a liwliw nu kanatal , idaw adidi' i yasaypayzan atu yamayniya e u nu timulan, yiseliy a kitidaan. I cungtung malusasa nu alapu tualci, atu puse ku tademaw,sakasepat a binacadan, malu maminay nu kitakid inayay ku kanatal nu binacadan sayadahay ku tademaw. ÁłĹšļļŚŹ£3000Ťź¨, . Kute a binacadan u icungtungay a tademaw aydaay sa tenesay a binacadan , tusamalebut tu kumihcaan katukuh ayda sa itini tu i kutesetan a buyu'buyu'an ku kitidaan a musaungay, u pahutin ku kawaw nu heni atu hida uhitay ku nikaudip, nudukudasa saahebal sa pakaynien i liwliw nu kakitidaan a mubuwah,capi nu ayda a mihcaan maydih patideng tu nu heni a kanatal , nika sawsawni puluan bu tulci, siliya, yilake a kanatal apenecan, alahican idaw ku kavalilaw tu masasu ada atademaw , duma mikuliay nu sihang a kanatal palu sakatalawan a tademaw han.. . Itini i hahuyceasate a nikuwanan nu siliya, kute a binacada a dikuc , ulisin atu kute ani patahekal tu cudad mausaw haminen apuluan; kyu u tulci kinapana maydih palekal masasuada tu tanuidang sa tu, 1991 "akute" nuayawan a mihcaan, akamu u sakaedengan nu tualci, kute hida hantu "buyu'ay atademaw kani pangangan. Nikuwanan nu satamu nu yilakepasayda i kute a binacadan mangaleb ku pisawacu, nakakyni palekal tu nu "alapu sa" ahulic, i yilaku katuud ku kute abinacadan haminen amubahbah patayda i yilang, anu caay sa kasenunhan mupatay. u mikingliway nu kute a binacadan udip itawya kuwanan nu yilang italakaway a enal miti a tademaw ku kakawsan sa, Pulung nu mihcaan enem ay asiki, miti makuwan nu puseti lusetati, miti atademaw atu puse a tademaw malalamel mala aydaay nu kute a binacadan . Kute a binacada nikaudip kitidaan nu heni i pulung nu mihcaan sepat a siki nudikudan tu katukuh oitu asiki nadikuda makuwan nu sayliwkuwang,ansitiku,limatiku,sasanpuse,tunglumatuku.yumahida kute a binacadan caay pakatidenh ku heni tu nu udip tu a sapikuwan,nika mademec tu nu icelangay a duma a binacaday, kyu hidasatu ku ngangan nu heni. pulung nu siki i mautang tu, baluhay a alapu atademaw lekeb han nuheni ku siya, kitidaan nu kuteabinacadan kinacacay aca a pasatedep, nipasatedep amasasuada kilusa tu u pipenec nu yiselan, kyukute abunacadan mademec nu alapu kyu milahay tu yiselan. alapu a kanatal nu dikuda malengat, telaymu a tademaw patideng sat u payi, tawya sa 945 amihcaan katukuh 1055 amihcaan kuwanan nu yilang nu tipan atu yilake mamin.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == kuk…ô"kuk…ô a kamu: *****r~…ĺuma a :kurd" umaudipaj i sijaa pańßutinau a bina ¶adan, i tipan tu timur~…ĺan jakut…ôs…ôtan a kitidaan nujtiniaj a tad…ômaw. ** . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan pur~…ĺuŇč nu tad…ômaw tur~…ĺur~…ĺ mar~…ĺ…ôbut a…ômaŇč, sajadańßaj nikar~…ĺakar~…ĺak i tuar~…ĺ ¶i, sir~…ĺija,jir~…ĺak…ô, jir~…ĺaŇč s…ôpat a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu kanatar~…ĺ , idaw adidi Ē~ ° i jasajpajzan atu jamajnija …ô u nu timur~…ĺan, jis…ôr~…ĺij a kitidaan. i ¶uŇčtuŇč mar~…ĺusasa nu ar~…ĺapu tuar~…ĺ ¶i, atu pus…ô ku tad…ômaw,sakas…ôpat a bina ¶adan, mar~…ĺu maminaj nu kitakid inajaj ku kanatar~…ĺ nu bina ¶adan sajadańßaj ku tad…ômaw. ********, . kut…ô a bina ¶adan u i ¶uŇčtuŇčaj a tad…ômaw ajdaaj sa t…ôn…ôsaj a bina ¶adan , tusamar~…ĺ…ôbut tu kumińß ¶aan katukuńß ajda sa itini tu i kut…ôs…ôtan a buju Ē~ °buju Ē~ °an ku kitidaan a musauŇčaj, u pańßutin ku kawaw nu ńß…ôni atu ńßida uńßitaj ku nikaudip, nudukudasa saańß…ôbar~…ĺ sa pakajni…ôn i r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu kakitidaan a mubuwańß, ¶api nu ajda a mińß ¶aan majdińß patid…ôŇč tu nu ńß…ôni a kanatar~…ĺ , nika sawsawni pur~…ĺuan bu tur~…ĺ ¶i, sir~…ĺija, jir~…ĺak…ô a kanatar~…ĺ ap…ôn…ô ¶an, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an idaw ku ka*ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw tu masasu ada atad…ômaw , duma mikur~…ĺiaj nu sińßaŇč a kanatar~…ĺ par~…ĺu sakatar~…ĺawan a tad…ômaw ńßan.. . itini i ńßańßuj ¶…ôasat…ô a nikuwanan nu sir~…ĺija, kut…ô a bina ¶ada a diku ¶ , ur~…ĺisin atu kut…ô ani patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ¶udad mausaw ńßamin…ôn apur~…ĺuan; kju u tur~…ĺ ¶i kinapana majdińß par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ masasuada tu tanuidaŇč sa tu, **** "akut…ô" nuajawan a mińß ¶aan, akamu u saka…ôd…ôŇčan nu tuar~…ĺ ¶i, kut…ô ńßida ńßantu "buju Ē~ °aj atad…ômaw kani paŇčaŇčan. nikuwanan nu satamu nu jir~…ĺak…ôpasajda i kut…ô a bina ¶adan maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ku pisawa ¶u, nakakjni par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu nu "ar~…ĺapu sa" ańßur~…ĺi ¶, i jir~…ĺaku katuud ku kut…ô abina ¶adan ńßamin…ôn amubańßbańß patajda i jir~…ĺaŇč, anu ¶aaj sa kas…ônunńßan mupataj. u mikiŇčr~…ĺiwaj nu kut…ô a bina ¶adan udip itawja kuwanan nu jir~…ĺaŇč itar~…ĺakawaj a …ônar~…ĺ miti a tad…ômaw ku kakawsan sa, pur~…ĺuŇč nu mińß ¶aan …ôn…ôm aj asiki, miti makuwan nu pus…ôti r~…ĺus…ôtati, miti atad…ômaw atu pus…ô a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ mar~…ĺa ajdaaj nu kut…ô a bina ¶adan . kut…ô a bina ¶ada nikaudip kitidaan nu ńß…ôni i pur~…ĺuŇč nu mińß ¶aan s…ôpat a siki nudikudan tu katukuńß oitu asiki nadikuda makuwan nu sajr~…ĺiwkuwaŇč,ansitiku,r~…ĺimatiku,sasanpus…ô,tuŇčr~…ĺumatuku.jumańßida kut…ô a bina ¶adan ¶aaj pakatid…ônńß ku ńß…ôni tu nu udip tu a sapikuwan,nika mad…ôm…ô ¶ tu nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a duma a bina ¶adaj, kju ńßidasatu ku ŇčaŇčan nu ńß…ôni. pur~…ĺuŇč nu siki i mautaŇč tu, bar~…ĺuńßaj a ar~…ĺapu atad…ômaw r~…ĺ…ôk…ôb ńßan nuńß…ôni ku sija, kitidaan nu kut…ôabina ¶adan kina ¶a ¶aj a ¶a a pasat…ôd…ôp, nipasat…ôd…ôp amasasuada kir~…ĺusa tu u pip…ôn…ô ¶ nu jis…ôr~…ĺan, kjukut…ô abuna ¶adan mad…ôm…ô ¶ nu ar~…ĺapu kju mir~…ĺańßaj tu jis…ôr~…ĺan. ar~…ĺapu a kanatar~…ĺ nu dikuda mar~…ĺ…ôŇčat, t…ôr~…ĺajmu a tad…ômaw patid…ôŇč sat u paji, tawja sa *** amińß ¶aan katukuńß **** amińß ¶aan kuwanan nu jir~…ĺaŇč nu tipan atu jir~…ĺak…ô mamin.
